mapper.select:
select * from comment
status = 1
and article_id = #{articleId}
and root_id = 0
order by created_time desc
select * from comment where article_id = #{articleId} order by created_time desc
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `comment` (id, status, updated_time) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.status}, #{item.updatedTime})
AS new ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = new.status, updated_time = new.updated_time
